description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a standard rectangular shape and a low-profile design. The surface is matte black, and the keycaps are uniformly spaced, with a dedicated number pad on the right side, function keys along the top, and arrow keys in the lower right. The keyboard appears to be made primarily of plastic, with visible key wells and a slightly contoured top surface for ergonomic typing. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is present on the surface. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A matte black, full-size computer keyboard with a number pad and standard key layout. The surface is clean and unbranded, with no visible cables or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the number pad and function keys.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile and slightly contoured surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keyboard and the arrangement of the keys from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the keys.
